case_title: HERBERT QUAN VS. LORRAINE PIEGAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUAN, HERBERT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUAN, HERBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIEGAN, LORRAINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 554 6TH AVE. #103, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $37.13 FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUAN, HERBERT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PIEGAN, LORRAINE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT PIEGAN, LORRAINE
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PIEGAN, LORRAINE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ORDER OF THE COURT GRANTING STAY OF EXECUTION UNTIL APRIL 8 2003 - JUDGE DAVID GARCIA.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUAN, HERBERT AS TO DEFENDANT PIEGAN, LORRAINE DOES 1 TO 10,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUAN, HERBERT ON DEFENDANT PIEGAN, LORRAINE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUAN, HERBERT SERVED MAR-01-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PIEGAN, LORRAINE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT PIEGAN, LORRAINE
